articles.title_en: Kremlin says Ukraine’s agreement not needed for Victory Day ceasefire — Putin has decided and it will happen
articles.lead_en: Russia will halt hostilities for Victory Day whether or not Ukraine agrees to a temporary ceasefire, Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said at a press briefing on April 30.

articles.title_en: The Russian Permanent Representative to the OSCE called the exercises of France and Poland preparation for war with the Russian Federation

articles.title_en: The Russian Embassy in Sweden monitors the observance of the rights of Russians on the cargo ship Caffa
articles.lead_en: Ambassador Sergei Belyaev recalled that the Swedish Transport Agency made comments on the technical condition of the vessel, which was traveling without cargo, and “imposed a ban on its operation until these comments were corrected.”
articles.title_raw: Посольство РФ в Швеции следит за соблюдением прав россиян на сухогрузе Caffa
articles.lead_raw: Посол Сергей Беляев напомнил, что Шведское транспортное агентство предъявило замечания к техническому состоянию судна, следовавшего без груза, и "наложило запрет на его эксплуатацию до исправления этих замечаний"
